rulings.Case Title: BRADLEY R. WHITE, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE et al VS. ALBERT K. CLIFFORD AKA AL CLIFFORD, AN INDIVIDUAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 17, 2012. Line 6 - CROSS DEFENDANT BRADLEY R. WHITE, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE and CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MELINDA B. CORTEZ et al VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 17, 2012. Line 1- DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW, RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant, with leave to amend as to all causes of action. 1st - to allege facts showing that plaintiffs identities were in fact stolen and damages. 2nd - to allege breach of written loan modification or allege breach of other contract. 3rd - to allege conduct outside the scope of defendants' role as mere money lender. 4th - to allege facts showing reliance. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL E GUTIERREZ-RANZI VS. RICHARD E SMOKE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 17, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT RICHARD SMOKE's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Grant. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES A. HENNEFER VS. MARGARET A. SELTZER, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SELTZER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 17, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT MARGARET SELTZER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule - 5 days to answer, plaintiff sufficiently alleges interest in property and sub lease with tenant. Sustain defendant's objection to plaintiff's declaration in opposition.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHU JI CAI VS. LARRY WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Suzanne Wong'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 17, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT SUZANNE WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, 5 days to answer moving party failed to establish how offices of Karen Uchiyama is "debt collector" within the meaning of FDCPA. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRYANT COURTYARDS, LLC VS. HIEU NGO et al
